about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.bio-condensed: TypeScript Full Stack Developer, I work daily with NestJS on the backend and Angular on the frontend. Passionate about the AI agent ecosystem, I specialized in configuring and integrating Claude Code in team settings…
about.bio-full: TypeScript Full Stack Developer, I work daily with NestJS on the backend and Angular on the frontend. Passionate about the AI agent ecosystem, I specialized in configuring and integrating Claude Code in team settings: designing rules, skills and custom commands to adapt the agent to each project's conventions. Coming from the .NET Core world, I've evolved and adapted to real-world needs. If you're looking for a developer who codes and knows how to leverage AI to deliver better and faster — I'm your dev.
